title: Google Gemini API Released Gemini 3.5 Flash And Managed Agents Preview
summary: Google Gemini API changelog listed Gemini 3.5 Flash as generally available and introduced Managed Agents in public preview, adding a Google-hosted agent runtime option for Gemini API developers.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Evaluate Gemini 3.5 Flash for Gemini API workloads and update model allowlists or benchmarks where the new GA model is relevant.
Review Managed Agents isolation, tool execution, and audit requirements before adopting Google-hosted agent runtimes.

detail.migration_notes: Managed Agents are tracked as a related workflow surface; this event does not assert default-model behavior or feature parity.

limitations: APW records the changelog-level launch facts only; teams should verify regional access, quotas, pricing, and preview terms before production use.
